name: Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Prepare the Pasta:
- 8 oz Manicotti Shells; 1 package
Prepare the Tomato Sauce:
- Mushrooms, stems and pieces
- 15 oz Tomato Sauce
- Tomato Paste
- Chopped Onion
- Minced Garlic
- Water
- Italian Seasoning
- Sugar
- Salt
- Ground Pepper
- Grated Parmesan Cheese
-------------
1. Cook and stir the ground beef and first 1/4 cup of chopped onion in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Drain off excess fat. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients for the Meat Filling.
2. Fill uncooked manicotti shells with the Meat Filling, packing into both ends. Place the shells in an ungreased baking pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches).
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Heat undrained mushrooms and remaining Tomato Sauce ingredients except Parmesan Cheese over medium heat until boiling, stirring occasionally.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for about 5 minutes. Pour the sauce over the filled shells.
6. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake until shells are tender (1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours). Sprinkle with grated Parmesan Cheese and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
